# Ugochukwu Maduagufor-Ogoke - Portfolio & Background

> I code, therefore I am

Ugochukwu Maduagufor-Ogoke is the Founder and Director of Altramax Media & Altramax Learn, and an AI Ethics and Technology Policy Enthusiast based in Nigeria. With a unique background as a philosopher turned technologist, he explores the intersection of technology, ethics, and policy. He is passionate about advancing responsible AI governance, algorithmic fairness, and human-centered technology policies.

## Contact & Social Links
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/ugochukwu-ogoke-212508177/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Maxugoski
- **Location:** Nigeria

## Author
**Ethics in Code** - A book exploring the ethical implications of artificial intelligence and modern digital technologies, focusing on responsible innovation, governance frameworks, and human-centered technology development. (Available on Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/Ethics-Code-Framework-Modern-Software/dp/B0G2B7J6QY)

## Core Skills
- **AI Ethics & Governance:** Responsible AI frameworks, Algorithmic fairness and bias awareness, AI risk and impact assessment, Technology ethics and digital governance.
- **Research & Policy Analysis:** Policy research and documentation, Ethical impact analysis, Technical research and report writing, Data governance and privacy awareness.
- **Technical Knowledge:** Artificial Intelligence fundamentals, Machine learning concepts, Web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, SQL), API integrations and cloud platforms.
- **Collaboration & Communication:** Cross-functional collaboration, Policy documentation and presentations, Technical writing and thought leadership.

## Organizations Founded
- **Altramax Learn:** An innovative e-learning platform connecting students with expert educators. It focuses on comprehensive technology education, allowing professionals to share their skills while giving learners access to high-quality educational content, certifications, and career-enhancing resources in fields like AI, Web Development, and Marketing.
- **Altramax Media:** A dynamic digital media agency specializing in modern visual storytelling and media production.

## Professional Experience
- **Founder and Director** @ Altramax Media & Altramax Learn
- **Web Developer & IT Support Specialist** @ Women's Aid Collective (WACOL) — Nigeria (March 2023 – Present)
- **Research Team Lead** @ ActionAid/WVL (Women's Aid Collective) — Nigeria (May 2024 – Jun 2024)
- **Mentoring and Coaching Civil Society Organisations** @ European Union/British Council (via WACOL) — Nigeria (Sep 2023 – Feb 2024)
- **Digital Communications & IT Support Intern** @ Women's Aid Collective (WACOL) — Nigeria (March 2022 – February 2023)
- **Team Leader** @ HopefulMe Social Network (UNN Chapter) (2018 – 2021)

## Education
**Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) — Philosophy**
University of Nigeria, Nsukka
- Second Class Honours (Lower Division)
- Relevant areas: Ethics and moral philosophy, Logic and critical reasoning, Philosophy of technology, Political philosophy and governance.

## Certifications
- **Generative AI Fundamentals Certification** (Microsoft / UNITAR)
- **Responsive Web Design Certification** (FreeCodeCamp)
- **Essential Digital Skills for Women and Youth in Africa** (UNITAR)

## Technical Tools
- **Programming / Web:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, SQL
- **Platforms:** WordPress, WooCommerce, Git, Cloud hosting
- **Cloud & Systems:** AWS, Google Cloud, cPanel, API integrations
- **Design & Research:** Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, documentation tools

## Professional Interests
- Responsible AI governance
- AI ethics and algorithmic accountability
- Technology policy and regulation
- Digital rights and data privacy
- Ethical frameworks for emerging technologies
